title: potentilla lignipes
intro: Potentilla lignipes, also known as Sticky Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla lignipes include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, tincture, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
